message.content:
**KINETICS 5 Start/Loading Screen UI:**  
- **Background:** Dark, sci-fi space theme with a planet, debris, and starships (top) and a futuristic armored character (bottom).  
- **Logo:** "KINETICS 5" in sleek, futuristic font (top section).  
- **Menu Buttons:** "NEW GAME" (blue, prominent), "CONTINUE", "LOAD GAME", "OPTIONS", "QUIT" (white text, horizontal row below logo).  
- **Layout:** Two mobile screen previews: Top = Start screen (logo + buttons); Bottom = Loading screen (character, progress bar at 55%, loading text).  

Concise, sci-fi aesthetic with clear, functional UI elements.
